name: W.R. Berkley Corporation 5.10% Subordinated Debentures due 2059
summary: W.R. Berkley Corporation 5.10% Subordinated Debentures due 2059 represents a debt instrument issued by W.R. Berkley Corporation. These are subordinated debentures, meaning they have a lower priority than other debt in the event of bankruptcy, and they mature in 2059. The debentures pay a fixed interest rate of 5.10%.
